case_title: SECRETARTY, UNITED STATES DEPARTMENT vs. STARKS, BARBARA et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT HEARING SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR SEP-07-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STARKS, BARBARA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: Y001 SUNNYDALE AVENUE, #415A, S.F $1,113.00 RENT, $725.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $25.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,863.00, LEASE FORFEITED, EXECUTION STAYED PENDING DEFT PAY $1,113.00 ON OR BEFORE SEPT 10,1993; $371.00 OR OTHER LAWFUL RENT ON OR BEFORE THE 5TH DAY OF EVERY MONTH STARTING OCT 5, 1993; $125.00 PER MONTH FROM 10/5/93 THRU 3/5/94.PLTF MAKE MONTHLY INSPECTIONS OF UNIT FROM 10/5/93 THRU 3/5/94. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
STIPULATION AND ORDER TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT JUDGMENT OF SEP-24-1993 SET ASIDE
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-07-1993 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED

#5 JDG WICK. CLERK G. VAN HEST. COURT AND COUNSEL IN CHAMBERS. DEFENSE ATTY, ROBERT NOEL, WAS NEVER NOTIFIED OF SETTLEMENT DATE. INFORMATION MAILED TO WRONG ADDRESS. CASE CONTINUED TO TUESDAY, SEPTEMBER 7, 1993, DEPT 1 AT 1:45PM FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. BOB NOEL PRESENT AT 10:00AM.

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SECRETARY,  UNITED STATES DEPARTMENT OF HOUSING AND URBAN DEVELOPMENT AS TO DEFENDANT STARKS, BARBARA DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT STARKS, BARBARA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT STARKS, BARBARA

MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SECRETARY,  UNITED STATES DEPARTMENT OF HOUSING AND URBAN DEVELOPMENT COURT TRIAL SET FOR SEP-01-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED; JURY TRIAL SET; NOTICE MAILED FILED BY DEFENDANT STARKS, BARBARA JURY TRIAL SET FOR SEP-01-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT HEARING SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR AUG-25-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 206
JURY TRIAL STRICKEN, TO COURT TRIAL ON SEP-01-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 PER DEPARTMENT AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
